NAME

SYNOPSIS

DESCRIPTION

This interface is made obsoleted by: sets the current signal mask Signals are blocked from delivery if the corresponding bit in is a 1; the macro is provided to construct the mask for a given The system quietly disallows or to be blocked.

RETURN VALUES

The previous set of masked signals is returned.

SEE ALSO

HISTORY

The function call appeared in and has been deprecated.
